items.definition_en: A cardigan is a knitted sweater that opens in the front.
items.example_en: She wore a red cardigan over her dress.

items.definition_en: A jacket is a short coat for the upper body.
items.example_en: He put on his jacket before going outside.

items.definition_en: A raincoat is a coat that keeps you dry in the rain.
items.example_en: She grabbed her raincoat when it started to rain.

items.definition_en: A parka is a warm jacket with a hood.
items.example_en: He wore a thick parka during winter.

items.definition_en: A coat is a piece of outer clothing for cold weather.
items.example_en: She wore a warm coat in December.

items.definition_en: An anorak is a hooded jacket that protects from wind and rain.
items.example_en: He zipped up his anorak before heading outdoors.

items.definition_en: A windbreaker is a light jacket that protects from wind.
items.example_en: She put on her windbreaker for her morning walk.

items.definition_en: A blazer is a smart jacket often worn as part of a suit.
items.example_en: He wore a blue blazer to the meeting.

items.definition_en: A cape is a loose cloak worn over the shoulders.
items.example_en: She put on a black cape for the costume party.

items.definition_en: A duster coat is a long light coat.
items.example_en: He wore a beige duster coat in spring.

items.definition_en: An overcoat is a thick coat worn over other clothes.
items.example_en: He removed his overcoat and hung it by the door.

items.definition_en: A trench coat is a long raincoat with a belt.
items.example_en: She likes to wear her trench coat in autumn.

items.definition_en: A gilet is a sleeveless jacket.
items.example_en: He wore a gilet over his shirt for extra warmth.

items.definition_en: A duffle coat is a thick coat with toggle fastenings.
items.example_en: She wore a navy duffle coat to school.

items.definition_en: A fur coat is a coat made from animal fur or synthetic fur.
items.example_en: She wore a long fur coat to the event.

items.definition_en: A pea coat is a short double-breasted wool coat.
items.example_en: He bought a classic navy pea coat last winter.

items.definition_en: A puffer jacket is a jacket filled with down or synthetic material.
items.example_en: He wore a puffer jacket because it was very cold.

items.definition_en: A down jacket is a warm jacket filled with down feathers.
items.example_en: She wore a down jacket during the ski trip.

items.definition_en: A shawl is a piece of cloth worn around the shoulders.
items.example_en: She wrapped a shawl around her shoulders.

items.definition_en: A poncho is a large piece of cloth with a hole for the head.
items.example_en: He wore a poncho to stay dry in the rain.
